meaning: n.泰米尔人,泰米尔语adj.泰米尔语的,泰米尔人的
examples: In a close race, Tamil votes are vital.
But it might offer the chance to win Tamil loyalties.
The origins of Tamil presence on the island are unclear.
In one incident, 44 Tamil refugees were killed when shells hit a 400-year-old Catholic Church.
By contrast, poorly performing rulers, eg, in West Bengal and Tamil Nadu, have been sent packing.
